# Hypothesis -- hk-broker-recon

**Testable sentence (provisional, to-be-tested):** operations staff at small HK brokerages
reconcile trades by hand every month-end, costing them days, because no affordable tool fits
a 1-10-rep shop.

## WHO
Operations / compliance staff at small Hong Kong brokerages (1-10 licensed reps). *Provisional.*

## HOW OFTEN
Every month-end close -- roughly 12 times a year, with 2 full days of work each close.

## HOW SEVERE
6-8 hours per close reconciling trades against statements by hand; a single missed break can
trigger a regulatory finding. *Provisional, to-be-tested.*

## STATUS QUO
They reconcile in Excel against broker statements, line by line, manually.

## VALUE & GROWTH
- **Value:** would they pay to turn a 2-day manual close into a few hours? *Provisional.*
- **Growth:** discovery via word of mouth among a small HK compliance-officer community. *Provisional.*
